last_task.subject: in the web UI, show address in first col, then location, then buttons should layout cleaner right now it's all smashed together. on mobile can drop under as buttons come in or whatever is cleanest. update for arc, restart arc's web service, then have to do the same for the fleet. sort of like a publishing skill (code changes, pull downstream, restart stuff). queue tasks to fix web UI and go through process, then create a task to review the process to create a skill / workflow for it we can apply
